proof: function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T1) { T0.0 = trivial_linear_map[T1, T0](x0) }[N, M](a + b)
function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T1) { T0.0 = trivial_linear_map[T1, T0](x0) }[N, M](a)
function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T1) { T0.0 = trivial_linear_map[T1, T0](x0) }[N, M](b)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[N](N.0)

goal: trivial_linear_map[M, N](a + b) = trivial_linear_map[M, N](a) + trivial_linear_map[M, N](b)

proof: function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) } = preserves_add[T0, T1](x0) }[M, N](trivial_linear_map[M, N])
let w0: M satisfy { exists(k0: M) { trivial_linear_map[M, N](w0 + k0) != trivial_linear_map[M, N](w0) + trivial_linear_map[M, N](k0) } }
let w1: M satisfy { trivial_linear_map[M, N](w0 + w1) != trivial_linear_map[M, N](w0) + trivial_linear_map[M, N](w1) }
function(x0: M, x1: M) { trivial_linear_map[M, N](x0) + trivial_linear_map[M, N](x1) = trivial_linear_map[M, N](x0 + x1) }(w0, w1)
function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T1) { T0.0 = trivial_linear_map[T1, T0](x0) }[N, M](src.smul(r, a))
function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T1) { T0.0 = trivial_linear_map[T1, T0](x0) }[N, M](a)

goal: trivial_linear_map[M, N](src.smul(r, a)) = dst.smul(r, trivial_linear_map[M, N](a))

proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2: AddCommGroup](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: Module[T0, T1], x2: Module[T0, T2]) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T1) { x0(x1.smul(x3, x4)) = x2.smul(x3, x0(x4)) } = preserves_smul[T0, T1, T2](x1, x2, x0) }[R, M, N](trivial_linear_map[M, N], src, dst)
let w0: R satisfy { exists(k0: M) { trivial_linear_map[M, N](src.smul(w0, k0)) != dst.smul(w0, trivial_linear_map[M, N](k0)) } }
let w1: M satisfy { trivial_linear_map[M, N](src.smul(w0, w1)) != dst.smul(w0, trivial_linear_map[M, N](w1)) }
function(x0: R, x1: M) { dst.smul(x0, trivial_linear_map[M, N](x1)) = trivial_linear_map[M, N](src.smul(x0, x1)) }(w0, w1)

function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: AddCommGroup, T3: Ring](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Module[T3, T0], x2: Module[T3, T1]) { (preserves_add[T0, T1](x0) and preserves_smul[T3, T0, T1](x1, x2, x0)) = is_linear_map[T3, T0, T1](x1, x2, x0) }[M, N, R](trivial_linear_map[M, N], src, dst)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T1](identity_fn[T1], x0, x1) = x0(x1) }[M, M](a.add, b)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[M, M, M](identity_fn[M], a.add, b)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { compose[T0, T0, T1](x0, identity_fn[T0], x1) = x0(x1) }[M, M](a.add, b)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { compose[T0, T0, T1](x0, identity_fn[T0], x1) = x0(x1) }[M, M -> M](M.add, a)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[M, M, M -> M](M.add, identity_fn[M], a)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[M, M, M](identity_fn(a).add, identity_fn[M], b)
function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) } = preserves_add[T0, T1](x0) }[M, M](identity_fn[M])

function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0, x2: (T1, T1) -> T1) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T0) { x0(x1(x3, x4)) = x2(x0(x3), x0(x4)) } = lib(relation_transport).preserves_binary_op[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[M, M](identity_fn[M], M.add, M.add)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> T0) { lib(relation_transport).preserves_binary_op[T0, T0](identity_fn[T0], x0, x0) }[M](M.add)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T1](identity_fn[T1], x0, x1) = x0(x1) }[M, M](src.smul(r), a)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[M, M, M](identity_fn[M], src.smul(r), a)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[M](a)

function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2: AddCommGroup](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: Module[T0, T1], x2: Module[T0, T2]) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T1) { x0(x1.smul(x3, x4)) = x2.smul(x3, x0(x4)) } = preserves_smul[T0, T1, T2](x1, x2, x0) }[R, M, M](identity_fn[M], src, src)
let w0: R satisfy { exists(k0: M) { identity_fn(src.smul(w0, k0)) != src.smul(w0, identity_fn(k0)) } }
let w1: M satisfy { identity_fn(src.smul(w0, w1)) != src.smul(w0, identity_fn(w1)) }
function(x0: R, x1: M) { src.smul(x0, identity_fn(x1)) = identity_fn(src.smul(x0, x1)) }(w0, w1)

function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: AddCommGroup, T3: Ring](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Module[T3, T0], x2: Module[T3, T1]) { (preserves_add[T0, T1](x0) and preserves_smul[T3, T0, T1](x1, x2, x0)) = is_linear_map[T3, T0, T1](x1, x2, x0) }[M, M, R](identity_fn[M], src, src)

goal: compose[M, N, K](f, g)(a + b) = f(g(a + b))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[M, N, K](f, g, a + b)
function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) } = preserves_add[T0, T1](x0) }[M, N](g)

function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0, x2: (T1, T1) -> T1) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T0) { x0(x1(x3, x4)) = x2(x0(x3), x0(x4)) } = lib(relation_transport).preserves_binary_op[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[M, N](g, M.add, N.add)

function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0, x2: (T1, T1) -> T1, x3: T0, x4: T0) { not lib(relation_transport).preserves_binary_op[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or x0(x1(x3, x4)) = x2(x0(x3), x0(x4)) }[M, N](g, M.add, N.add, a, b)
function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) } = preserves_add[T0, T1](x0) }[N, K](f)

function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0, x2: (T1, T1) -> T1) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T0) { x0(x1(x3, x4)) = x2(x0(x3), x0(x4)) } = lib(relation_transport).preserves_binary_op[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[N, K](f, N.add, K.add)

function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0, x2: (T1, T1) -> T1, x3: T0, x4: T0) { not lib(relation_transport).preserves_binary_op[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or x0(x1(x3, x4)) = x2(x0(x3), x0(x4)) }[N, K](f, N.add, K.add, g(a), g(b))
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[M, N, K](f, g, a)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[M, N, K](f, g, b)

goal: compose[M, N, K](f, g)(a + b) = compose[M, N, K](f, g)(a) + compose[M, N, K](f, g)(b)

proof: function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) } = preserves_add[T0, T1](x0) }[M, K](compose[M, N, K](f, g))

goal: preserves_smul[R, M, N](a, b, g) = forall(x0: R, x1: M) { g(a.smul(x0, x1)) = b.smul(x0, g(x1)) }
proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2: AddCommGroup](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: Module[T0, T1], x2: Module[T0, T2]) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T1) { x0(x1.smul(x3, x4)) = x2.smul(x3, x0(x4)) } = preserves_smul[T0, T1, T2](x1, x2, x0) }[R, M, N](g, a, b)

goal: preserves_smul[R, N, K](b, c, f) = forall(x0: R, x1: N) { f(b.smul(x0, x1)) = c.smul(x0, f(x1)) }
proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2: AddCommGroup](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: Module[T0, T1], x2: Module[T0, T2]) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T1) { x0(x1.smul(x3, x4)) = x2.smul(x3, x0(x4)) } = preserves_smul[T0, T1, T2](x1, x2, x0) }[R, N, K](f, b, c)

goal: compose[M, N, K](f, g)(a.smul(r, x)) = f(g(a.smul(r, x)))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[M, N, K](f, g, a.smul(r, x))
preserves_smul[R, M, N](a, b, g)
(forall(x0: R, x1: M) { g(a.smul(x0, x1)) = b.smul(x0, g(x1)) } = true)
function(x0: R) { forall(x1: M) { g(a.smul(x0, x1)) = b.smul(x0, g(x1)) } = true }(r)
function(x0: R, x1: M) { b.smul(x0, g(x1)) = g(a.smul(x0, x1)) }(r, x)
preserves_smul[R, N, K](b, c, f)
(forall(x0: R, x1: N) { f(b.smul(x0, x1)) = c.smul(x0, f(x1)) } = true)
function(x0: R) { forall(x1: N) { f(b.smul(x0, x1)) = c.smul(x0, f(x1)) } = true }(r)
function(x0: R, x1: N) { c.smul(x0, f(x1)) = f(b.smul(x0, x1)) }(r, g(x))
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[M, N, K](f, g, x)

goal: c.smul(r, compose[M, N, K](f, g)(x)) = c.smul(r, f(g(x)))
compose[M, N, K](f, g)(a.smul(r, x)) = c.smul(r, compose[M, N, K](f, g)(x))

proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2: AddCommGroup](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: Module[T0, T1], x2: Module[T0, T2]) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T1) { x0(x1.smul(x3, x4)) = x2.smul(x3, x0(x4)) } = preserves_smul[T0, T1, T2](x1, x2, x0) }[R, M, K](compose[M, N, K](f, g), a, c)
